name: Software Engineer
description: Build software systems, apps, and platforms using programming and problem solving.

name: UI/UX Designer
description: Design user-friendly interfaces and experiences through creativity and user research.

name: Data Analyst
description: Analyze data to find insights, trends, and make business decisions.

name: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protect systems from cyber threats, detect attacks, and improve security.

name: Network Engineer
description: Design and maintain networks, servers, and IT infrastructure.

name: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop Android/iOS applications with strong coding and design understanding.

name: Game Developer
description: Build games using programming, creativity, and performance optimization.

name: Cloud Engineer
description: Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure and scalable services.

name: AI/ML Engineer
description: Build machine learning models and intelligent systems.
